description_long: This radiator features a robust, industrial design with four thick, evenly spaced vertical columns connected by horizontal pipes at the top and bottom. The main body is constructed from dark metallic material, with visible bolts and joints that suggest durability and efficient heat transfer. Two prominent pipe connections extend from either side, one with a right-angle bend and the other with a straight segment, both supported by sturdy feet. A manual valve is mounted on one end, allowing for direct control of water or steam flow. The radiator sits on a flat base, indicating it is designed for floor-standing installation. The overall finish is smooth and slightly glossy, with a dark gray and metallic color palette.
description: A heavy-duty, floor-standing radiator with four thick vertical columns, side pipe connections, and a manual valve, finished in dark metallic tones.
description_view_0: The radiator is seen from the narrow end, showing the rounded profile of the columns and the end of the pipe connection.
description_view_1: A full side view reveals the four vertical columns, both pipe connections, the manual valve, and the supporting feet.
description_view_2: The opposite narrow end view highlights the alignment of the columns and the straight pipe connection.
description_view_3: Another side view, similar to view 1, but from the opposite side, showing the alternate pipe connection and the valve's position.
attribute_pipe_connections: two, one on each side; left side with right-angle bend, right side straight; both horizontal entry
